name: jupyterlab-firefox-launcher
description: JupyterLab extension to launch Firefox in a tab
author: Your Name

scripts.build: cd frontend && tsc && cp ../install.json ../jupyterlab_firefox_launcher/labextension/ && cp package.json ../jupyterlab_firefox_launcher/labextension/ || echo '{"name": "jupyterlab-firefox-launcher", "version": "0.1.0"}' > ../jupyterlab_firefox_launcher/labextension/package.json
